headline: Intuit Anthropic AI Alliance Tests New Agents And Earnings Narrative
summary: Intuit (NasdaqGS:INTU) announced a multi year AI partnership with Anthropic to build custom AI agents and integrate Intuit financial intelligence into Anthropic products. The agreement is designed to let businesses deploy specialized agents for tailored financial workflows across Intuit's platforms. Intuit's financial data and capabilities will be embedded directly into Anthropic's AI tools, extending access to Intuit powered financial insights for businesses and consumers. For investors...

headline: Here is Why Wix.com (WIX) is Expected to Deliver Strong Returns
summary: Wix.com Limited (NASDAQ:WIX) is one of the 10 beaten-down technology stocks that could bounce back in 2026. On February 23, Jefferies reduced its price target on Wix.com Limited (NASDAQ:WIX) from $200 to $130. The firm reaffirmed a Buy rating on the stock, which still offers an impressive upside potential of over 82% despite the price […]

headline: A Market Frenzy Is Lurking Beneath Those Calm Stock Indexes
summary: Shares of the memory-chip manufacturer Sandisk have nearly tripled, meanwhile, while Texas Pacific Land, a real-estate company that has become a data-center play, is up 85%.  Cox’s income-oriented, dividend-focused holdings have had a strong year.
